selected_clean_sql: SELECT MAX("Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)") FROM frpm WHERE "County Name" = 'Alameda';

SELECT s.School, f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)"
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.StatusType = 'Continuation'
ORDER BY f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)" ASC
LIMIT 3
SELECT DISTINCT s."Zip" FROM schools s JOIN frpm f ON s."CDSCode" = f."CDSCode" WHERE f."County Name" = 'Fresno' AND f."Charter School (Y/N)" = 1;

SELECT s."MailStreet"
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s."CDSCode" = f."CDSCode"
ORDER BY f."FRPM Count (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT s."Phone" FROM schools s JOIN frpm f ON s."CDSCode" = f."CDSCode" WHERE f."Charter School (Y/N)" = 1 AND f."Charter Funding Type" = 'Direct' AND s."OpenDate" > '2000-01-01';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM schools s 
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode 
JOIN satscores sat ON s.CDSCode = sat.cds 
WHERE sat.AvgScrMath > 400 AND s.Virtual = 'F'
SELECT sname FROM frpm f JOIN schools sc ON f.CDSCode = sc.CDSCode JOIN satscores ss ON f.CDSCode = ss.cds WHERE NumTstTakr > 500 AND Magnet = 1
SELECT s.Phone FROM schools s JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds ORDER BY NumTstTakr DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT s."NumTstTakr"
FROM "frpm" f
JOIN "satscores" s ON f."CDSCode" = s."cds"
WHERE f."FRPM Count (K-12)" = (
    SELECT MAX("FRPM Count (K-12)")
    FROM "frpm"
)

SELECT COUNT(s.cds)
FROM satscores s
JOIN frpm f ON s.cds = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.AvgScrMath > 560 
AND f.CharterFundingType = 'Directly Funded';

SELECT f."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)"
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
ORDER BY s.AvgScrRead DESC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT "CDSCode" FROM frpm WHERE ("Enrollment (K-12)" + "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") > 500;

SELECT MAX(f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)") AS HighestEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE s.NumGE1500 / s.NumTstTakr > 0.3;

SELECT s.Phone 
FROM satscores sat 
JOIN schools s ON sat.cds = s.CDSCode 
ORDER BY (sat.NumGE1500 * 1.0 / NULLIF(sat.NumTstTakr, 0)) DESC 
LIMIT 3;
SELECT s."NCESSchool", f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f."CDSCode" = s."CDSCode" ORDER BY f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" DESC LIMIT 5;

SELECT s.District, AVG(sat.AvgScrRead) AS AvgReadingScore
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores sat ON s.CDSCode = sat.cds
WHERE s.StatusType = 'Active'
GROUP BY s.District
ORDER BY AvgReadingScore DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM satscores s
JOIN schools sc ON s.cds = sc.CDSCode
WHERE sc.District = 'Merged Alameda' AND s.NumTstTakr < 100;

SELECT s."School Name", s."Charter School Number", ss."AvgScrWrite"
FROM "schools" s
JOIN "satscores" ss ON s."CDSCode" = ss."cds"
WHERE ss."AvgScrWrite" > 499 
AND s."Charter School Number" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ss."AvgScrWrite" DESC;

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM satscores s
JOIN schools sch ON s.cds = sch.CDSCode
WHERE sch.County = 'Fresno' AND sch.FundingType = 'Direct funded' AND s.NumTstTakr <= 250;

SELECT s.Phone 
FROM schools s 
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode 
WHERE f.AvgScrMath = (SELECT MAX(AvgScrMath) FROM frpm);

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.County = 'Los Angeles'
  AND f."Free Meal Count (K-12)" > 500
  AND f."FRPM Count (K-12)" < 700;

SELECT sname, NumTstTakr 
FROM satscores s 
JOIN schools sch ON s.cds = sch.CDSCode 
WHERE sch.County = 'Contra Costa' 
ORDER BY NumTstTakr DESC 
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    s."School",
    s."Street",
    s."City",
    s."State",
    s."Zip"
FROM 
    "frpm" f
JOIN 
    "schools" s ON f."CDSCode" = s."CDSCode"
WHERE 
    ABS(f."Enrollment (K-12)" - f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") > 30
ORDER BY 
    ABS(f."Enrollment (K-12)" - f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") DESC;
SELECT s."School" FROM frpm f JOIN satscores sc ON f."CDSCode" = sc.cds WHERE (f."Free Meal Count (K-12)" / f."Enrollment (K-12)") > 0.1 AND sc."NumGE1500" > 0;

SELECT s.FundingType 
FROM schools s 
JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds 
WHERE s.County = 'Riverside' 
GROUP BY s.CDSCode, s.School, s.FundingType 
HAVING AVG(ss.AvgScrMath) > 400

SELECT s."School", s."Street", s."City", s."State", s."Zip"
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s."CDSCode" = f."CDSCode"
WHERE s."County" = 'Monterey'
  AND f."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)" > 800
  AND s."School" LIKE '%High%';

SELECT s.School, ss.AvgScrWrite, s.Phone
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE s.OpenDate > '1991-01-01' OR s.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01';

SELECT s."School", s."DOCType" FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f."CDSCode" = s."CDSCode" WHERE s."FundingType" = 'Locally funded' AND (f."Enrollment (K-12)" - f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") > (SELECT AVG(f2."Enrollment (K-12)" - f2."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") FROM frpm f2 JOIN schools s2 ON f2."CDSCode" = s2."CDSCode" WHERE s2."FundingType" = 'Locally funded');
SELECT s."OpenDate" FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f."CDSCode" = s."CDSCode" WHERE f."School Type" = 'K-12' ORDER BY f."Enrollment (K-12)" DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.City, f."Enrollment (K-12)"
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
ORDER BY f."Enrollment (K-12)" ASC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT COUNT(*) + 10 AS offset_value, 
       AVG(eligible_free_rate) AS avg_eligible_free_rate
FROM (
    SELECT "Free Meal Count (K-12)" / "Enrollment (K-12)" AS eligible_free_rate,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC) AS rn
    FROM frpm
    WHERE "Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL 
      AND "Free Meal Count (K-12)" IS NOT NULL
) AS ranked_data
WHERE rn BETWEEN 10 AND 11;

SELECT "School Name", "FRPM Count (K-12)" / "Enrollment (K-12)" AS eligible_rate FROM frpm JOIN schools ON frpm."CDSCode" = schools."CDSCode" WHERE schools."SOC" = '66' ORDER BY "FRPM Count (K-12)" DESC LIMIT 5;

SELECT s.Website, f."School Name"
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE f."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" BETWEEN 1900 AND 2000;

SELECT 
    (f."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS free_rate
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f."CDSCode" = s."CDSCode"
WHERE 
    s."AdmFName1" = 'Kacey' AND s."AdmLName1" = 'Gibson'
SELECT AdmEmail1 FROM schools WHERE CDSCode IN (SELECT CDSCode FROM frpm WHERE "Charter School (Y/N)" = 1 ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" LIMIT 1)
SELECT AdmFName1, AdmLName1, AdmFName2, AdmLName2, AdmFName3, AdmLName3 FROM schools WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT cds FROM satscores ORDER BY NumGE1500 DESC LIMIT 1);

SELECT s."Street", s."City", s."Zip", s."State" FROM satscores sc JOIN schools s ON sc.cds = s."CDSCode" WHERE sc."NumTstTakr" > 0 ORDER BY (CAST(sc."NumGE1500" AS REAL) / sc."NumTstTakr") ASC LIMIT 1;

SELECT s."Website"
FROM "schools" s
JOIN "satscores" sc ON s."CDSCode" = sc."cds"
WHERE s."County" = 'Los Angeles'
AND sc."NumTstTakr" BETWEEN 2000 AND 3000

SELECT AVG(s.NumTstTakr) 
FROM satscores s 
JOIN schools sc ON s.cds = sc.CDSCode 
WHERE sc.County = 'Fresno' AND strftime('%Y', sc.OpenDate) = '1980';

SELECT s.Phone 
FROM schools s 
JOIN satscores sat ON s.CDSCode = sat.cds 
WHERE s.District = 'Fresno Unified' 
ORDER BY sat.AvgScrRead ASC 
LIMIT 1;

WITH ranked_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        s."School",
        s."County",
        sc."AvgScrRead",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s."County" ORDER BY sc."AvgScrRead" DESC) AS rank
    FROM schools s
    JOIN satscores sc ON s."CDSCode" = sc."cds"
    WHERE s."Virtual" = 'F'
)
SELECT "School"
FROM ranked_schools
WHERE rank <= 5;

SELECT s.GSoffered FROM frpm f 
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode 
JOIN (SELECT cds, MAX(AvgScrMath) as max_math 
      FROM satscores GROUP BY cds) m 
ON f.CDSCode = m.cds;

SELECT satscores."AvgScrMath", schools."County" FROM satscores JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools."CDSCode" WHERE satscores.cds = (SELECT cds FROM satscores ORDER BY ("AvgScrMath" + "AvgScrRead" + "AvgScrWrite") ASC LIMIT 1);

SELECT s.City, sa.AvgScrWrite
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
WHERE sa.NumGE1500 = (
    SELECT MAX(NumGE1500)
    FROM satscores
);

SELECT 
    s."School" AS School_Name,
    AVG(ss."AvgScrWrite") AS Average_Writing_Score
FROM 
    "schools" s
JOIN 
    "satscores" ss ON s."CDSCode" = ss."cds"
WHERE 
    s."AdmFName1" = 'Ricci' AND s."AdmLName1" = 'Ulrich'
GROUP BY 
    s."School"

SELECT s.State, f."Enrollment (K-12)"
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f."CDSCode" = s."CDSCode"
WHERE s.DOC = '31'
ORDER BY f."Enrollment (K-12)" DESC;

SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS FLOAT)/12 
FROM frpm, schools 
WHERE frpm.CountyName = 'Alameda' AND schools.DOCType = 'Elementary School District' 
AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM OpenDate) = 1980;

SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN frpm."District Type" LIKE '%Unified%' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) / 
       COUNT(CASE WHEN frpm."District Type" LIKE '%Elementary%' THEN 1 END)
FROM frpm
WHERE frpm."County Name" = 'Orange';

SELECT County, School, ClosedDate 
FROM schools 
WHERE StatusType = 'Closed' 
ORDER BY County;

SELECT s."Street", s."School"
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores ss ON s."CDSCode" = ss."cds"
ORDER BY ss."AvgScrMath" DESC
LIMIT 1 OFFSET 6;

SELECT schools.MailStreet, schools.School 
FROM schools 
JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds 
WHERE AvgScrRead = (SELECT MIN(AvgScrRead) FROM satscores)
ORDER BY MailStreet LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM satscores s
JOIN schools sc ON s.cds = sc.CDSCode
WHERE (s.AvgScrRead + s.AvgScrMath + s.AvgScrWrite) >= 1500
AND sc.MailCity = 'Lakeport'
SELECT SUM(s.NumTstTakr) FROM frpm f JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds WHERE f.MailCity = 'Fresno'

SELECT s."School", s."MailZip" FROM schools s WHERE s."AdmFName1" = 'Avetik' AND s."AdmLName1" = 'Atoian' OR s."AdmFName2" = 'Avetik' AND s."AdmLName2" = 'Atoian' OR s."AdmFName3" = 'Avetik' AND s."AdmLName3" = 'Atoian';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN County = 'Colusa' THEN 1 END) * 1.0) /
    COUNT(CASE WHEN County = 'Humboldt' THEN 1 END)
FROM schools 
WHERE MailState = 'CA';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE MailState = 'CA' AND City = 'San Joaquin' AND StatusType = 'Active';
SELECT Phone, Ext FROM schools s JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds ORDER BY AvgScrWrite DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 332;
SELECT "School", "Phone", "Ext" FROM schools WHERE "Zip" = '95203-3704';

SELECT DISTINCT s."Website" FROM schools s WHERE s."AdmFName1" = 'Mike' AND s."AdmLName1" = 'Larson' OR s."AdmFName2" = 'Mike' AND s."AdmLName2" = 'Larson' OR s."AdmFName3" = 'Mike' AND s."AdmLName3" = 'Larson' OR s."AdmFName1" = 'Dante' AND s."AdmLName1" = 'Alvarez' OR s."AdmFName2" = 'Dante' AND s."AdmLName2" = 'Alvarez' OR s."AdmFName3" = 'Dante' AND s."AdmLName3" = 'Alvarez';

SELECT Website 
FROM schools 
WHERE Virtual = 'P' 
AND Charter = 1 
AND County = 'San Joaquin';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE City = 'Hickman' AND DOC = '52' AND Charter = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f."CDSCode" = s."CDSCode" WHERE s."County" = 'Los Angeles' AND s."Charter" = 0 AND (f."Free Meal Count (K-12)" * 100.0 / f."Enrollment (K-12)") < 0.18;

SELECT s.School, s.City, CONCAT(s.AdmFName1, ' ', s.AdmLName1) AS Admin1, 
       CONCAT(s.AdmFName2, ' ', s.AdmLName2) AS Admin2,
       CONCAT(s.AdmFName3, ' ', s.AdmLName3) AS Admin3
FROM schools s
WHERE Charter = 1 AND CharterNum = '00D2'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE MailCity = 'Hickman' AND CharterNum = '00D4';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN FundingType = 'Local' THEN CDSCode END) * 100.0 / COUNT(CDSCode)) AS Ratio_Percentage
FROM schools
WHERE County = 'Santa Clara';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM schools
WHERE FundingType = 'Directly Funded'
  AND County = 'Stanislaus'
  AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2000-01-01' AND '2005-12-31';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM schools 
WHERE City = 'San Francisco' AND StatusType = 'Closed' 
AND ClosedDate >= '1989-01-01' AND ClosedDate <= '1989-12-31';

SELECT County, COUNT(*) as closure_count 
FROM schools 
WHERE SOC = '11' 
AND ClosedDate BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1989-12-31'
GROUP BY County 
ORDER BY closure_count DESC 
LIMIT 1;
SELECT "NCESDist" FROM schools WHERE "SOC" = '31';

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalDistrictCommunityDaySchools,
    SUM(CASE WHEN StatusType = 'Active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ActiveSchools,
    SUM(CASE WHEN StatusType = 'Closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ClosedSchools
FROM schools
WHERE County = 'Alpine'
    AND EdOpsName LIKE '%District Community Day School%';
SELECT frpm."District Code" FROM frpm JOIN schools ON frpm."CDSCode" = schools."CDSCode" WHERE schools.Magnet = 0 AND schools.City = 'Fresno'

SELECT "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" 
FROM frpm 
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode 
WHERE frpm."Academic Year" = '2014-15' 
AND frpm."School Name" LIKE '%State Special School%' 
AND frpm."County Name" = 'Fremont' 
AND schools.EdOpsCode = 'SSS';

SELECT frpm."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)"
FROM frpm 
JOIN schools ON frpm."CDSCode" = schools."CDSCode"
WHERE schools.School LIKE '%Youth Authority%'
AND schools.MailStreet = 'PO Box 1040';
SELECT "Low Grade" FROM frpm WHERE "EdOpsCode" = 'SPECON' AND "NCESDist" = '0613360';

SELECT s.School, s.EdOpsName 
FROM schools s 
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode 
WHERE f."County Code" = '37' AND f."NSLP Provision Status" = 2;

SELECT s."City" FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f."CDSCode" = s."CDSCode" WHERE f."County Name" = 'Merced' AND f."Low Grade" = '9' AND f."High Grade" = '12' AND f."NSLP Provision Status" = '2' AND s."EILCode" = 'HS' LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    frpm."School Name", 
    frpm."Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)"
FROM frpm 
WHERE frpm."County Name" = 'Los Angeles' 
AND frpm."Low Grade" = 'K'
AND frpm."High Grade" = '09';

SELECT "Low Grade" || '-' || "High Grade" AS grade_span, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm."CDSCode" = schools."CDSCode"
WHERE schools."City" = 'Adelanto'
GROUP BY grade_span
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT County, COUNT(*) as num_schools 
FROM schools 
WHERE Virtual = 'F' AND (County IN ('San Diego', 'Santa Barbara')) 
GROUP BY County 
ORDER BY num_schools DESC 
LIMIT 1;
SELECT frpm."School Name", frpm."School Type", schools.Latitude FROM frpm JOIN schools ON frpm."CDSCode" = schools.CDSCode WHERE schools.Latitude IS NOT NULL ORDER BY schools.Latitude DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.City, f."Low Grade", f."School Name"
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.State = 'CA'
ORDER BY s.Latitude ASC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT "Low Grade", "High Grade" FROM frpm WHERE "CDSCode" = (SELECT "CDSCode" FROM schools ORDER BY ABS("Longitude") DESC LIMIT 1);

SELECT 
    frpm."School Name",
    COUNT(DISTINCT schools."City") as CityCount,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY schools."City") as SchoolCountInEachCity
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm."CDSCode" = schools."CDSCode"
WHERE 
    frpm."Low Grade" = 'K' 
    AND frpm."High Grade" = '8'
    AND schools."Magnet" = 1
    AND frpm."NSLP Provision Status" = 'Multiple Provision Types';

SELECT 
    "AdmFName1" AS FirstName,
    "District" AS District,
    COUNT(*) AS Count
FROM "schools"
WHERE "AdmFName1" IS NOT NULL AND "AdmFName1" != ''
GROUP BY "AdmFName1", "District"
ORDER BY Count DESC
LIMIT 2;

SELECT f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)", s."District Code"
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f."CDSCode" = s."CDSCode"
WHERE s."AdmFName1" = 'Alusine' OR s."AdmFName2" = 'Alusine' OR s."AdmFName3" = 'Alusine'
SELECT s."District", s."County", s."School", s."AdmLName1" FROM schools s WHERE s."CharterNum" = '40';

SELECT AdmEmail1, AdmEmail2, AdmEmail3
FROM schools
WHERE County = 'San Bernardino'
  AND City = 'San Bernardino City Unified'
  AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'
  AND (SOC = '62' OR DOC = '54');

SELECT s."School", s."AdmEmail1"
FROM "schools" s
JOIN "satscores" sc ON s."CDSCode" = sc."cds"
WHERE sc."NumGE1500" = (
    SELECT MAX("NumGE1500")
    FROM "satscores"
)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.account_id)
FROM account a
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A3 = 'East Bohemia'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM disp dp 
    JOIN card c ON dp.disp_id = c.card_id 
    WHERE dp.account_id = a.account_id 
    AND c.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.account_id)
FROM account a
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A3 = 'Prague'
AND a.account_id IN (
    SELECT account_id 
    FROM loan 
    WHERE status != 'A'
);
SELECT AVG(A12) AS avg_1995, AVG(A13) AS avg_1996 FROM district;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM (
    SELECT d.district_id
    FROM district d
    JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY d.district_id
    HAVING AVG(d.A11) > 6000 AND AVG(d.A11) < 10000
) AS subquery;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id)
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'M' 
AND d.A3 = 'North Bohemia'
AND d.A11 > 8000;

WITH female_clients AS (
    SELECT 
        c.client_id,
        c.birth_date,
        d.A11 AS avg_salary
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
),
oldest_clients AS (
    SELECT 
        client_id,
        birth_date,
        avg_salary
    FROM female_clients
    WHERE birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM female_clients)
),
lowest_avg_salary AS (
    SELECT 
        AVG(avg_salary) AS avg_salary
    FROM oldest_clients
),
highest_avg_salary AS (
    SELECT 
        AVG(avg_salary) AS avg_salary
    FROM female_clients
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT avg_salary FROM highest_avg_salary) - (SELECT avg_salary FROM lowest_avg_salary) AS gap

SELECT a.account_id FROM account a JOIN client c ON a.district_id = c.district_id JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id WHERE c.birth_date = (SELECT MAX(birth_date) FROM client) AND d.A11 = (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id)
FROM account a
JOIN client c ON a.district_id = c.district_id
WHERE a.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM disp d 
    WHERE d.account_id = a.account_id 
    AND d.type = 'OWNER'
)
SELECT d.client_id FROM disp d JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id WHERE d.type = 'DISPONENT' AND a.frequency = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';

SELECT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE l.date >= '1997-01-01' AND l.date <= '1997-12-31'
AND l.status = 'A'
AND l.amount = (
    SELECT MIN(amount)
    FROM loan
    WHERE date >= '1997-01-01' AND date <= '1997-12-31'
    AND status = 'A'
)
AND a.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE'

SELECT l.account_id, MAX(l.amount) as approved_amount
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE l.duration > 12 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM a.date) = 1993
GROUP BY l.account_id
ORDER BY approved_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id)
FROM client c
JOIN account a ON c.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
AND c.birth_date < '1950-01-01'
AND d.A2 = 'Sokolov';

SELECT DISTINCT account.*
FROM account
JOIN trans ON account.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM trans.date) = 1995 
AND trans.date = (
    SELECT MIN(date)
    FROM trans
    WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) = 1995
);
SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id FROM account a JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id WHERE a.date < '1997-01-01' AND t.amount > 3000;
SELECT c.client_id FROM client c JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id WHERE ca.issued = '1994-03-03';
SELECT a.date FROM trans t JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id WHERE t.amount = 840 AND t.date = '1998-10-14';
SELECT a.district_id FROM loan l JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id WHERE l.date = '1994-08-25';
SELECT MAX(t.amount) FROM trans t JOIN disp d ON t.account_id = d.account_id JOIN card c ON d.disp_id = c.disp_id WHERE c.issued = '1996-10-21';

SELECT c.gender FROM client c JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id JOIN district di ON a.district_id = di.district_id WHERE di.A11 = (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district) AND d.type = 'OWNER' ORDER BY c.birth_date ASC LIMIT 1;

SELECT t.amount
FROM trans t
JOIN loan l ON t.account_id = l.account_id
JOIN (
    SELECT l1.account_id, l1.loan_id, l1.amount
    FROM loan l1
    WHERE l1.amount = (SELECT MAX(l2.amount) FROM loan l2)
) biggest_loan ON l.account_id = biggest_loan.account_id AND l.loan_id = biggest_loan.loan_id
WHERE t.date > (
    SELECT MIN(date)
    FROM trans t2 
    WHERE t2.account_id = biggest_loan.account_id
)
ORDER BY t.date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district di ON c.district_id = di.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND di.A2 = 'Jesenik';

SELECT disp_id 
FROM trans t 
JOIN disp d ON t.account_id = d.account_id 
WHERE t.amount = 5100 AND DATE_PART('year', t.date) = 1998 AND DATE_PART('month', t.date) = 9 AND DATE_PART('day', t.date) = 2;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM account a JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id WHERE d.A2 = 'Litomerice' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM a.date) = 1996;

SELECT d.A2
FROM client c
JOIN account a ON c.client_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND c.birth_date = '1976-01-29'

SELECT c.birth_date
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE l.amount = 98832 AND l.date = '1996-01-03';

SELECT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN disp dp ON a.account_id = dp.account_id
JOIN client c ON dp.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE d.A3 = 'Prague'
ORDER BY a.date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(c.client_id)) AS male_percentage
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district dt ON a.district_id = dt.district_id
WHERE dt.A3 = 'Hlavní město Prahy' AND dt.A4 = (
    SELECT MAX(A4) 
    FROM district 
    WHERE A3 = 'Hlavní město Prahy'
);

WITH first_loan AS (
    SELECT loan_id, account_id 
    FROM loan 
    WHERE status = 'approved' AND date >= '1993-07-05'
    ORDER BY date 
    LIMIT 1
),
balance_earlier AS (
    SELECT balance 
    FROM trans t 
    JOIN first_loan fl ON t.account_id = fl.account_id 
    WHERE date <= '1993-03-22' 
    ORDER BY date DESC 
    LIMIT 1
),
balance_later AS (
    SELECT balance 
    FROM trans t 
    JOIN first_loan fl ON t.account_id = fl.account_id 
    WHERE date <= '1998-12-27' 
    ORDER BY date DESC 
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT ((bl.balance - be.balance) * 100.0 / be.balance) AS increase_rate
FROM balance_earlier be, balance_later bl;
SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'A' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(amount)) AS percentage_paid_no_issue FROM loan;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN l.status = 'C' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage
FROM 
    loan l
WHERE 
    l.amount < 100000;

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id, d.A2 AS district_name, d.A3 AS district_region
FROM account a
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN disp di ON a.account_id = di.account_id

SELECT a.account_id, a.frequency FROM account a JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id WHERE d.A3 = 'east Bohemia' AND a.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'

SELECT a.account_id, a.date

SELECT d.A2 AS district, d.A3 AS region FROM loan l JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id WHERE l.loan_id = 4990;

    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_rate_increment_percentage
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    disp dp ON a.account_id = dp.account_id
JOIN 
    client c ON dp.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN 
    district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id

SELECT 
    bond_type,
    COUNT(*) as bond_count,
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(*) > (SELECT COUNT(*) * 0.5 FROM bond WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010') 
        THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END as is_carcinogenic
FROM bond 
WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010'
GROUP BY bond_type
ORDER BY bond_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT (COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bond)) AS percentage
FROM (
    SELECT a1.element AS element1, a2.element AS element2
    FROM connected c
    JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
    JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
    JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
    GROUP BY a1.element, a2.element
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
) most_common
JOIN connected c2 ON EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM atom a3
    JOIN atom a4 ON a4.atom_id = c2.atom_id2
    WHERE a3.atom_id = c2.atom_id
    AND a3.element = most_common.element1
    AND a4.element = most_common.element2
);

WITH sp_count AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) as spanish_count 
  FROM foreign_data 
  WHERE language = 'Spanish'
),
total_cards AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT fd.uuid) as total_count 
  FROM cards c 
  JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
)
SELECT 
  ROUND(
    (sp_count.spanish_count * 100.0 / total_cards.total_count), 
    2
  ) as percentage_spanish,
  fd.name
FROM foreign_data fd
JOIN sp_count ON true
JOIN total_cards ON true
WHERE fd.language = 'Spanish'
ORDER BY fd.name;

SELECT AVG(set_count) as avg_annual_sets,
       (SELECT language 
        FROM set_translations 
        GROUP BY language 
        ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC 
        LIMIT 1) as common_language
FROM (
    SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM releaseDate) as year_release,
           COUNT(DISTINCT id) as set_count
    FROM sets
    WHERE releaseDate BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2015-12-31'
    GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM releaseDate)
) annual_sets;

FROM 
    results r1

    drivers d ON r1.driverid = d.driverid

    results r2 ON r1.raceid + 1 = r2.raceid AND r1.driverid = r2.driverid

WITH race_info AS (
    SELECT r.raceId, r.date 
    FROM races r 
    WHERE r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM r.date) = 2008
),
champion_time AS (
    SELECT r.milliseconds,
           CASE WHEN r.milliseconds IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(r.time AS text)
                ELSE (SELECT CAST(SUM(lt.milliseconds/1000.0)/3600.0 AS text) 
                      FROM lapTimes lt 
                      WHERE lt.raceId = ri.raceId AND lt.driverId = r.driverId)
           END as champion_lap_time
    FROM race_info ri
    JOIN results r ON r.raceId = ri.raceId
    WHERE r.positionOrder = 1
),
last_driver_time AS (
    SELECT r.milliseconds,
           CASE WHEN r.milliseconds IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(r.time AS text)
                ELSE (SELECT CAST(SUM(lt.milliseconds/1000.0)/3600.0 AS text) 
                      FROM lapTimes lt 
                      WHERE lt.raceId = ri.raceId AND lt.driverId = r.driverId)
           END as last_driver_lap_time
    FROM race_info ri
    JOIN results r ON r.raceId = ri.raceId
    WHERE r.positionOrder = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM results WHERE raceId = ri.raceId)
),
incremental_time AS (
    SELECT last_driver.milliseconds - champion.milliseconds as incremental_ms
    FROM last_driver_time last_driver, champion_time champion
)
SELECT 
       ROUND(
           ((SELECT incremental_ms FROM incremental_time)/NULLIF(last_driver.milliseconds, 0)) * 100,
           2
       ) as percentage_faster
FROM champion_time champion,
     last_driver_time last_driver;

SELECT pa.finishing, pa.curve
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.weight = (SELECT MAX(weight) FROM Player)
LIMIT 1;

SELECT L.name, COUNT(M.id) AS game_count
FROM Match M
JOIN League L ON M.league_id = L.id
WHERE M.season = '2015/2016'
GROUP BY L.name
ORDER BY game_count DESC
LIMIT 4;

SELECT T2.team_long_name 
FROM Match AS M 
JOIN Team AS T ON M.away_team_api_id = T.team_api_id 
GROUP BY T.team_long_name 
ORDER BY SUM(M.away_team_goal) DESC 
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Player.player_name
FROM Player
JOIN Player_Attributes ON Player.player_api_id = Player_Attributes.player_api_id
ORDER BY Player_Attributes.overall_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN p.height < 180 AND pa.overall_rating > 70 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(p.id)) AS percentage
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.height IS NOT NULL AND pa.overall_rating IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
    CASE WHEN (COUNT(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'M' AND P.Admission = '+' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'M' THEN 1 END)) > 
          (COUNT(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'M' AND P.Admission = '-' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'M' THEN 1 END))
    THEN 'in-patient'
    ELSE 'outpatient'
    END AS more_type,
    ABS((COUNT(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'M' AND P.Admission = '+' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'M' THEN 1 END)) - 
        (COUNT(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'M' AND P.Admission = '-' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'M' THEN 1 END))) AS deviation
FROM Patient P;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Birthday) > '1930' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage
FROM Patient
WHERE SEX = 'F'

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p."Admission" = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN p."Admission" = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio
FROM "Patient" p
WHERE p."Diagnosis" = 'SLE'

SELECT p.Diagnosis, l.Date 
FROM Patient p 
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID 
WHERE p.ID = 30609;

SELECT p.SEX, p.Birthday, e."Examination Date", e.Symptoms 
FROM Patient p 
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID 
WHERE p.ID = 163109

SELECT p."ID", p."SEX", p."Birthday"
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p."ID" = l."ID"
WHERE l."LDH" > 500;

SELECT P.ID, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, P.Birthday)) AS Age
FROM Patient P
JOIN Examination E ON P.ID = E.ID
WHERE E.RVVT = '+';

SELECT p."ID", p."SEX", p."Diagnosis"
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p."ID" = e."ID"
WHERE e."Thrombosis" = 2;

SELECT DISTINCT p.*
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE YEAR(p.Birthday) = 1937 AND l.`T-CHO` >= 250;

SELECT p."ID", p."SEX", p."Diagnosis"
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p."ID" = l."ID"
WHERE l."ALB" < 3.5

SELECT AVG(e."aCL IgG")
FROM "Examination" e
JOIN "Patient" p ON e."ID" = p."ID"
WHERE p."Admission" = '+'
AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM p."Birthday")) >= 50;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient 
WHERE SEX = 'F' 
  AND STRFTIME('%Y', Description) = '1997' 
  AND Admission = '-';
SELECT MIN(YEAR(`First Date`) - YEAR(Birthday)) AS Youngest_Age_At_Admission FROM Patient;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID)
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE e."Thrombosis" = 1 
AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM e."Examination Date") = 1997
AND p.SEX = 'F'

SELECT MAX(YEAR(P.Birthday)) - MIN(YEAR(P.Birthday)) AS AgeGap
FROM Patient P
JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE L.TG >= 200;

SELECT e."Symptoms", e."Diagnosis"
FROM "Examination" e
JOIN "Patient" p ON e."ID" = p."ID"
WHERE e."Symptoms" IS NOT NULL
AND p."Birthday" = (
    SELECT MAX("Birthday")
    FROM "Patient"
)

SELECT COUNT(p."ID") / 12.0 AS average_monthly_lab_tests
FROM "Patient" p
JOIN "Laboratory" l ON p."ID" = l."ID"
WHERE p."SEX" = 'M'
AND l."Date" BETWEEN '1998-01-01' AND '1998-12-31'

SELECT 
    MAX(l."Date") AS "Laboratory Date",
    YEAR(p."First Date") - YEAR(p."Birthday") AS "Age at Admission"
FROM 
    "Patient" p
JOIN 
    "Laboratory" l ON p."ID" = l."ID"
WHERE 
    p."Diagnosis" = 'SJS'
GROUP BY 
    p."ID", p."First Date", p."Birthday"
ORDER BY 
    p."Birthday" ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) AS ratio
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE (p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA <= 8.0) OR (p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA <= 6.5)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID)
FROM Patient p
LEFT JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE DATEDIFF('year', p.FirstDate, e.`Examination Date`) >= 1;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.ID)
FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE YEAR(e.`Examination Date`) BETWEEN 1990 AND 1993
AND DATEDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, e.`Examination Date`) < 18;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID) 
FROM Patient p 
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID 
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' AND l."T-BIL" >= 2.0;

SELECT Diagnosis, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM Examination 
WHERE "Examination Date" BETWEEN '1985-01-01' AND '1995-12-31'
GROUP BY Diagnosis 
ORDER BY count DESC 
LIMIT 1;

SELECT AVG(1999 - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM p."Birthday")) AS average_age
FROM "Patient" p
JOIN "Laboratory" l ON p."ID" = l."ID"
WHERE l."Date" BETWEEN '1991-10-01' AND '1991-10-31';

SELECT 
    (strftime('%Y', E."Examination Date") - strftime('%Y', P.Birthday)) AS Age,
    P.Diagnosis
FROM 
    Examination E
JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON E.ID = L.ID AND E."Examination Date" = L.Date
JOIN 
    Patient P ON E.ID = P.ID
ORDER BY 
    L.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT ANA FROM Examination WHERE ID = 3605340 AND "Examination Date" = '1996-12-02';

SELECT P.SEX
FROM Patient P
WHERE P.Diagnosis = 'AORTITIS'
ORDER BY P."First Date"
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e."aCL IgM"

FROM "Patient" p
JOIN "Laboratory" l ON p."ID" = l."ID"

SELECT COUNT(Lab.ID)
FROM Patient P
JOIN Laboratory Lab ON P.ID = Lab.ID
WHERE P.First_Date = '1991-06-13' 
AND P.Diagnosis LIKE '%SJS%'
AND Lab.Date >= '1995-01-01'

SELECT p.Diagnosis 
FROM Patient p 
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID

SELECT e.Symptoms 
FROM Examination e 
JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN AVG(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-11%' THEN CAST(T_CHO AS FLOAT) END) = 0 
        THEN NULL 
        ELSE (AVG(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-11%' THEN CAST(T_CHO AS FLOAT) END) - 
              AVG(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12%' THEN CAST(T_CHO AS FLOAT) END)) / 
             AVG(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-11%' THEN CAST(T_CHO AS FLOAT) END)
    END * 100 as decrease_rate
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE p.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT DISTINCT l."ID" FROM "Laboratory" l WHERE l."Date" BETWEEN '1987-07-06' AND '1996-01-31' AND l."GPT" > 30 AND l."ALB" < 4;

SELECT "ID"
FROM "Patient"

    (COUNT(CASE WHEN l.UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage
FROM 
    Laboratory l

    l."U-PRO" > 0 AND l."U-PRO" < 30

FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p 
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID 
WHERE p.SEX = 'F'

    COUNT(CASE WHEN p.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' THEN 1 END) AS REAL
) / 
COUNT(*) * 100.0 as proportion_of_sle_from_itp

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID)
FROM Patient p

CASE

END AS "Normal Range"

FROM Patient p

SELECT DISTINCT P.ID
FROM Patient P

SELECT P.Diagnosis
FROM Patient P
JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID

SELECT AVG(LDH) FROM Laboratory WHERE LDH < 500;

FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN "Admission" = '+' THEN 1 END) as InpatientCount, 
       COUNT(CASE WHEN "Admission" = '-' THEN 1 END) as OutpatientCount
FROM "Patient"
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM "Laboratory" 
    WHERE "Laboratory"."ID" = "Patient"."ID" 
    AND "ALP" < 300
);

SELECT p."ID", l."ALP"
FROM "Patient" p
JOIN "Laboratory" l ON p."ID" = l."ID"
WHERE p."Birthday" = '1982-04-01'
AND l."ALP" < 300

FROM Patient p 
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID

SELECT l."ID", l."TP" - 8.5 AS TP_deviation FROM "Laboratory" l JOIN "Patient" p ON l."ID" = p."ID" WHERE p."SEX" = 'F' AND l."TP" > 8.5;

SELECT Patient.ID, Patient.Birthday, Laboratory.ALB
FROM Patient
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Patient.SEX = 'M' AND (Laboratory.ALB <= 3.5 OR Laboratory.ALB >= 5.5)

SELECT 
    p."ID",
    CASE 
        WHEN l."ALB" BETWEEN 3.5 AND 5.5 THEN 'Within Normal Range'
        ELSE 'Outside Normal Range'
    END AS Albumin_Status
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p."ID" = l."ID"
WHERE strftime('%Y', p."Birthday") = '1982'

SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.UA > 6.5 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS Female_UA_Percentage
FROM Patient AS T1
JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE T1.SEX = 'F';

SELECT AVG(l."UA") AS average_ua
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l."ID" = p."ID"
WHERE l."UA" < 8.0 AND p."SEX" = 'M' OR l."UA" < 6.5 AND p."SEX" = 'F'
AND l."Date" = (
    SELECT MAX(l2."Date")
    FROM Laboratory l2

)

SELECT p.ID, p.SEX, p.Birthday 
FROM Patient p 
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID

SELECT P.ID, P.SEX, P.Birthday

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID)

FROM Laboratory AS T1
JOIN Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE T1.CRE >= 1.5;

SELECT p.ID, p.SEX, p.Birthday 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.T_BIL = (SELECT MAX(T_BIL) FROM Laboratory);

SELECT P.SEX, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT L.ID) 
FROM Patient P 
JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID 
WHERE L.T_BIL >= 2.0

SELECT p."ID", l."T-CHO" FROM "Patient" p JOIN "Laboratory" l ON p."ID" = l."ID" WHERE p."Birthday" = (SELECT MIN("Birthday") FROM "Patient") ORDER BY l."T-CHO" DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT AVG((EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "Birthday"))) AS average_age 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' AND l."T-CHO" >= 250;

SELECT P.ID, P.Diagnosis
FROM Patient P

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID)

JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID 
FROM Patient p 
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID 
WHERE p.Admission = '-' AND l.CPK < 250;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID)

JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID

AND l.CPK >= 250;

SELECT p."ID", p."SEX", (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM p."Birthday")) AS age
FROM "Patient" p
JOIN "Laboratory" l ON p."ID" = l."ID"

SELECT p."ID", l."GLU" FROM "Patient" p JOIN "Laboratory" l ON p."ID" = l."ID" WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM p."Description") = 1991 AND l."GLU" < 180;

    p."ID", 
    p."SEX", 
    p."Birthday"
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p."ID" = l."ID"
WHERE 
    l."WBC" <= 3.5 OR l."WBC" >= 9.0
GROUP BY 
    p."SEX", 
    p."ID", 
    p."Birthday"
ORDER BY 
    p."SEX", 
    p."Birthday" ASC;

SELECT 
    p."ID",
    p."Diagnosis",
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p."Birthday")) AS age
FROM 
    "Patient" p
JOIN 
    "Laboratory" l ON p."ID" = l."ID"

    l."RBC" < 3.5

SELECT P.ID, P.Admission
FROM Patient P
JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE P.SEX = 'F'
  AND (strftime('%Y', current_timestamp) - strftime('%Y', P.Birthday)) >= 50

    COUNT(CASE WHEN L.PLT < 100 THEN 1 END) as lower_than_normal,

FROM Patient p

WITH customer_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ym.CustomerID) AS CustomerCount
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
    GROUP BY c.Segment, SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4)
),
segment_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        TotalConsumption / CustomerCount AS AvgConsumption
    FROM customer_consumption
),
lowest_consumption_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        AvgConsumption,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Segment ORDER BY AvgConsumption ASC) AS rn
    FROM segment_averages
),
lowest_avg_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        AvgConsumption
    FROM lowest_consumption_customers
    WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT AvgConsumption FROM lowest_avg_consumption WHERE Segment = 'SME') - 
    (SELECT AvgConsumption FROM lowest_avg_consumption WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_LAM_Difference,
    (SELECT AvgConsumption FROM lowest_avg_consumption WHERE Segment = 'LAM') - 
    (SELECT AvgConsumption FROM lowest_avg_consumption WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_KAM_Difference,
    (SELECT AvgConsumption FROM lowest_avg_consumption WHERE Segment = 'KAM') - 
    (SELECT AvgConsumption FROM lowest_avg_consumption WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_SME_Difference

WITH ConsumptionChange AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        AVG(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption END) - AVG(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption END) AS ChangeInConsumption,
        AVG(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption END) AS Consumption2012
    FROM 
        customers c
    JOIN 
        yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        c.Currency = 'EUR'
        AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    GROUP BY 
        c.Segment
),
PercentageChange AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        (ChangeInConsumption / Consumption2012) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease
    FROM 
        ConsumptionChange
)
SELECT 
    MAX(PercentageIncrease) AS MaxPercentageIncrease,
    MIN(PercentageIncrease) AS MinPercentageIncrease
FROM 
    PercentageChange;
